entries.result: one reflection answered late; no disciplinary event is created by lateness alone
standing water found above the label but below the room name
result withheld because the witness had already gone home in a previous shift
handbook clause relocated after citation; use the printed copy facing away from glass
light remains on in rooms remembered as dark; maintenance closed the ticket anyway
badge echo delayed by 2.1 seconds; temporary absence preserved
the cup is empty, facing away, and therefore compliant for today
the corridor accepted the request and then changed which side the door was on
